machine.name: Qualification Verification Monitor
machine.description: Tracks identity verification, income verification, program-specific qualification criteria, and active enrollment status for community service participants. Qualification verification is the formal determination layer sitting between eligibility screening and active benefit delivery — it catches identity mismatches, income discrepancies, and program-specific rules (residency duration, asset limits, household composition) that screening tools miss. Output at [964:968] feeds the Workflow Completion Monitor.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.populationFocus: Benefits program enrollees requiring formal qualification determination; participants at annual redetermination; newly enrolled individuals with pending verification holds

sensorNormalization.identity_verification_norm: 0.0=identity cannot be verified (no SSN, no acceptable ID, data mismatch with DMV or SSA records), 0.5=identity partially verified (one of two factors confirmed), 1.0=identity fully verified through authoritative source
sensorNormalization.income_verification_norm: 0.0=income cannot be verified (self-employment undocumented, cash income only, employer unresponsive), 0.5=income partially verified (one income source confirmed; second source pending), 1.0=all income sources verified against pay stubs, tax records, or benefit award letters
sensorNormalization.program_qualification_norm: 0.0=program-specific rules not met (asset limit exceeded, residency duration insufficient, household composition mismatch), 0.5=program rules met but one qualifier requires additional documentation, 1.0=all program-specific qualification criteria confirmed
sensorNormalization.enrollment_active_norm: 0.0=enrollment lapsed, suspended, or terminated; benefits not flowing, 0.5=enrollment conditionally active (provisional benefits; verification hold), 1.0=enrollment fully active; benefits flowing without restriction

governance.notes: Auto-backfilled by scripts/backfill-governance.mjs from primaryDomain="community-services".  Review and tune the routing as the team owning QualificationVerificationMonitor matures.

rules.description: QUALIFICATION_FAILED: qualification verification failed; benefits suspended at [964:968]
REVERIFICATION_REQUIRED: qualification verification approaching expiry or triggered event detected at [964:968]
FULLY_QUALIFIED: all verification criteria met; enrollment fully active at [964:968]

sequences.name: Qualification Failure: QUALIFIED+ → DISCREPANCY → HOLD → QUALIFICATION_FAILED

metadata.description: Tracks qualification status collapse from a confirmed state through a discrepancy finding to formal disqualification. Common triggers: annual redetermination reveals income increase over threshold, identity data mismatch discovered during inter-agency verification, household composition change not reported. Requires QUALIFIED+ baseline before failure escalation arms.

metadata.name: QUALIFIED
metadata.description: QUALIFIED+ — identity verified, income verified, program rules met, enrollment active. isInitial A*A = A+.

metadata.name: DISCREPANCY
metadata.description: DISCREPANCY — one or more verification factors showing data mismatch; income figure inconsistent with reported amount; program rule borderline.
metadata.enrollment_status: 0.40–0.48 (provisional; discrepancy notice issued; cure period open)

metadata.name: HOLD
metadata.description: HOLD — verification hold active; benefits suspended or restricted; discrepancy unresolved after cure period. Fires QUALIFICATION_FAILED.
QUALIFICATION_FAILED: qualification verification failed; benefits suspended at [964:968]
metadata.action: Formal adverse action notice; fair hearing rights notification; appeal process initiation; navigator assistance for documentation cure

metadata.description: Fires REVERIFICATION_REQUIRED when enrollment is approaching the annual redetermination deadline or when a triggered event (new income, change of address, household composition change) requires fresh verification. Proactive signal prevents benefit lapse from missed redetermination.

metadata.name: LAPSING
metadata.description: LAPSING+ — identity and program qualification current; income verification approaching expiry or triggered event detected; enrollment still active but reverification window open. isInitial A*A = A+: fires REVERIFICATION_REQUIRED each cycle.
metadata.scenario: Annual redetermination due in 30 days; income verification from last year; new job start date reported

metadata.description: REVERIFICATION_REQUIRED: qualification verification approaching expiry or triggered event detected at [964:968]
metadata.action: Redetermination appointment scheduling; document collection checklist; proactive outreach to prevent gap in benefits

metadata.description: Fires FULLY_QUALIFIED when all four verification dimensions are current, confirmed, and enrollment is fully active. Downstream workflow completion monitor uses this alongside document signing completion to confirm the participant is ready for unrestricted service delivery.

metadata.name: VERIFIED
metadata.description: VERIFIED+ — all verification factors confirmed; program rules met; enrollment fully active without restriction. Fires FULLY_QUALIFIED each cycle.
metadata.scenario: Medicaid enrollee: SSA identity match confirmed, income verified via W-2, household composition confirmed at redetermination, active enrollment with no holds

metadata.description: FULLY_QUALIFIED: all verification criteria met; enrollment fully active at [964:968]
metadata.action: Workflow completion monitor registers qualification confirmed; unrestricted service delivery authorized

inputSequences.name: Annual Redetermination with Income Change
inputSequences.pattern: 5-step: QUALIFIED→QUALIFIED→LAPSING (redetermination due)→DISCREPANCY (new income flagged)→QUALIFIED (income verified within limits)
inputSequences.description: Medicaid enrollee hits annual redetermination; new part-time job income flagged; verified as still within threshold; qualification confirmed.
